    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Serialized Form

    D

    Dashboard - Class in controller
    Controller class for the Dashboard view in the personal finance application.
    Dashboard() - Constructor for class controller.Dashboard
     
    Dashboard.BudgetViewModel - Class in controller
    View Model class for Budgets in the UI.
    Dashboard.DisplayReminder - Class in controller
    DisplayReminder class for showing reminders in the UI.
    Dashboard.Transaction - Class in controller
    Internal class representing a transaction for display purposes in the UI.
    delete(String) - Method in class controller.BudgetTracker
    Deletes a budget from the tracker by its ID.
    delete(String) - Method in class controller.ExpenseTracker
    Deletes an expense from the tracker by its ID.
    delete(String) - Method in interface interfaces.Tracker
    Deletes a tracked item.
    delete(String) - Method in class model.IncomeTracker
    Deletes an income entry from the tracker by its ID.
    DisplayReminder(String, LocalDate, double, int) - Constructor for class controller.Dashboard.DisplayReminder
    Creates a new DisplayReminder instance.
